name: stealthsurf-extension
description: StealthSurf browser extension — HTTP proxy for Chrome and Firefox. Use your proxies, split tunneling, and more without installing VPN.

scripts.build:chrome: VITE_TARGET=chrome vite build && cp manifest/manifest.chrome.json dist/chrome/manifest.json && cp -r src/assets/icons dist/chrome/ && cp src/callback/callback.html src/callback/callback.js dist/chrome/
scripts.build:firefox: VITE_TARGET=firefox vite build && cp manifest/manifest.firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json && cp -r src/assets/icons dist/firefox/ && cp src/callback/callback.html src/callback/callback.js src/background/background.html dist/firefox/
scripts.build:firefox:github: VITE_TARGET=firefox vite build && cp manifest/manifest.firefox.github.json dist/firefox/manifest.json && cp -r src/assets/icons dist/firefox/ && cp src/callback/callback.html src/callback/callback.js src/background/background.html dist/firefox/
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:all:github: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox:github
scripts.release:github: rm -rf release && npm run build:all:github && npm run pack:all
scripts.release:store: rm -rf release && npm run build:all && npm run pack:all
